course.title: Lesson 11: One Good Turn Deserves Another

segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: I was having dinner at a restaurant when Tony Steele came in.

translations.zh-Hans: 我正在一家餐馆吃饭，托尼·斯蒂尔走了进来。

segments.text: Tony worked in a lawyer's office years ago, but he is now working at a bank.

translations.zh-Hans: 托尼几年前在一家律师事务所工作，现在在一家银行任职。

segments.text: He gets a good salary, but he always borrows money from his friends and never pays it back.

translations.zh-Hans: 他的薪水很高，但他总是向朋友借钱，而且从来不还。

segments.text: Tony saw me and came and sat at the same table.

translations.zh-Hans: 托尼看见我，便走过来坐到同一张桌旁。

segments.text: He has never borrowed money from me.
While he was eating, I asked him to lend me twenty pounds.

translations.zh-Hans: 他吃饭时，我请他借给我20英镑。

segments.text: To my surprise, he gave me the money immediately.

translations.zh-Hans: 令我惊讶的是，他立刻把钱给了我。

segments.text: I have never borrowed any money from you, Tony said.
So now you can pay for my dinner.

translations.zh-Hans: “所以现在你可以替我付饭钱了。”
